# System Recovery Manual

Recovery Manual ID:
SRM-X.Y.Z

---

## Purpose

This file represents the approved System Recovery Manual that should accompany every Recovery Point.

Each operational Recovery Point shall contain a copy of the current approved System Recovery Manual as it existed when the Recovery Point was created.

This preserves the recovery procedures that were valid at that point in time.

---

## Instructions

Before finalizing a new Recovery Point:

1. Copy the current approved `SYSTEM_RECOVERY_MANUAL.md` into the Recovery Point.
2. Verify the copied file opens correctly.
3. Record the appropriate Recovery Manual ID in the Recovery Point Manifest.

---

## Validation

Confirm that:

- The manual exists.
- The manual version matches the Recovery Point.
- The Recovery Manual ID matches the value recorded in `RP_MANIFEST.md`.

---

This file exists as part of the Recovery Point Template and is intended as a reference only.
